ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "featured_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the featured image */,
  "excerpt" TEXT /* Excerpt or summary of the post */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last modified */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the post */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the post belongs to */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Unique slug for the post URL */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the post */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes for the post */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, editor, admin) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Unique slug for the category URL */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (NULL for top-level categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Unique slug for the tag URL */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-tag mapping */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (NULL for top-level comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the revision belongs to */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Revision number */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post in this revision */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post in this revision */,
  "featured_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the featured image in this revision */,
  "excerpt" TEXT /* Excerpt or summary of the post in this revision */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date and time the revision was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the revision */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the revision (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (in JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the post (NULL for anonymous users) */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was viewed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user viewing the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the post */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date and time the post was liked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_dislikes" (
  "dislike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dislike event */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being disliked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who disliked the post */,
  "dislike_date" TEXT /* Date and time the post was disliked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dislike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_dislikes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_dislikes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., comment, like, mention) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
